sat-notes.title: ACH 101: Stop Trusting Your Gut
sat-notes.description: Why attribution is a trap, and how Analysis of Competing Hypotheses (ACH) saves you from firing the wrong admin.

geoCTI.title: AiTM Token Compromise: Assessing the Strategic Intent of the April 2026 Code of Conduct Campaign
geoCTI.description: Between April 14 and 16, 2026, an unidentified adversary executed a large-scale credential theft operation targeting over 13,000 organizations, with a 92% concentration in the United States.

geoCTI.title: Initial Access Brokers Target Indian Financial Services and LiteLLM Proxy Infrastructure
geoCTI.description: A surge in underground listings reveals a coordinated effort by initial access brokers to monetize high-privilege credentials and automated exploit tooling.

geoCTI.title: Monetization of AccountDumpling: Assessing the Vietnamese-Linked Facebook Phishing Infrastructure
geoCTI.description: A phishing operation codenamed AccountDumpling has successfully compromised approximately 30,000 Facebook accounts by leveraging Google AppSheet as a distribution relay.

geoCTI.title: RMM Tool Abuse in VENOMOUS#HELPER Campaign Targets 80+ U.S. Organizations
geoCTI.description: Since April 2025, the VENOMOUS#HELPER campaign has utilized legitimate Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) software, specifically SimpleHelp and ScreenConnect, to establish persistent access within over 80 organizations.

geoCTI.title: ScarCruft Supply Chain Compromise: BirdCall Malware Expansion to Android Targets Ethnic Koreans in China
geoCTI.description: ScarCruft has transitioned from a Windows-centric backdoor deployment to a cross-platform capability by compromising a video game platform's software components.

geoCTI.title: Sightline Intelligence Hardware Shipments to Elbit Systems Enable Autonomous Target Classification
geoCTI.description: Cargo manifests reveal at least ten shipments of SLA-3000-OEM embedded video processing boards from Portland-based Sightline Intelligence to Israel's Elbit Systems between 2024 and 2025.

geoCTI.title: Silver Fox: China-Linked Social Engineering Targets India and Russia via ABCDoor and ValleyRAT
geoCTI.description: A campaign involving over 1,600 social engineering messages has deployed ABCDoor and ValleyRAT malware against organizations in India and Russia.

geoCTI.title: Sophos's Six-Year Counter-Espionage Campaign Against Chinese-Linked Firewall Exploitation
geoCTI.description: For six years, Sophos engaged in an active defense campaign to intercept and disrupt state-backed intrusions targeting their firewall infrastructure.

geoCTI.title: The Arrest of a Scattered Spider Member and the Limits of Law Enforcement Intervention
geoCTI.description: The recent arrest of a Scattered Spider operative marks a rare successful disruption of a financially motivated group known for high-profile social engineering.

geoCTI.title: The EU Digital Fairness Act: Privacy-First Regulation vs. Surveillance-Driven Enforcement
geoCTI.description: The European Commission is preparing the Digital Fairness Act (DFA) to address deceptive design and exploitative personalization within the EU's digital market.

geoCTI.title: The Erosion of Cyber Norms in the 'Wild Wild West' Era
geoCTI.description: Tom Uren and The Grugq argue that the established boundaries of international cyber operations have fundamentally collapsed.

geoCTI.title: The Section 702 Renewal and the Infrastructure of Turnkey Totalitarianism
geoCTI.description: The U.S.

geoCTI.title: The Shift from Drones to Turbojet-Powered Missiles in Russia-Ukraine Air Warfare
geoCTI.description: Russia is actively re-engineering Shahed-style drones by integrating turbojet engines to increase flight speeds by up to 150%.

geoCTI.title: UK Digital ID Consultation: State Centralization vs. Civil Liberty Protections
geoCTI.description: The UK government, under Prime Minister Keir Starmer, is advancing a national digital identity scheme designed to centralize verification of residency and work status on personal devices.

geoCTI.title: CVE-2026-31431 Exploitation: The Threat to Cloud-Native Kubernetes Integrity
geoCTI.description: The discovery of the 'Copy Fail' vulnerability (CVE-2026-31431) within the Linux kernel's crypto-subsystem provides a mechanism for unprivileged users to achieve root access across major distributions including Ubuntu, Red Hat, and Amazon Linux.

geoCTI.title: Data Exfiltration from Moldova's CNAM Database: Strategic Intelligence or Opportunistic Theft?
geoCTI.description: An unidentified hacking group successfully exfiltrated personal and financial data from Moldova's National Health Insurance Agency (CNAM), compromising the records of a significant portion of the Moldovan population.

geoCTI.title: Extortion-Driven DDoS: Assessing the Pro-Iran Campaign Against Canonical
geoCTI.description: A pro-Iran hacktivist group has transitioned from disruptive DDoS attacks to an active extortion campaign targeting Canonical's web infrastructure.

geoCTI.title: Post-Shai Hulud npm Supply Chain Evolution: From Package Poisoning to CI/CD Persistence
geoCTI.description: The npm ecosystem has transitioned from simple package poisoning to a more durable threat model involving wormable malware and CI/CD pipeline persistence.

geoCTI.title: SHADOW-EARTH-053 Operations Target NATO and Asian Government Sectors
geoCTI.description: A China-aligned threat cluster, designated SHADOW-EARTH-053 by Trend Micro, has executed a coordinated espionage campaign against government, defense, and media targets in South, East, and Southeast Asia, alongside a single NATO member state.

geoCTI.title: The Erosion of Medical Neutrality: Lessons from Russian Targeting in Ukraine
geoCTI.description: Russian forces in Ukraine have transitioned from incidental damage to the deliberate targeting of aid stations, evacuation routes, and trauma teams.

geoCTI.title: The Silicon Valley-Pentagon Nexus: Weaponizing LLMs in the Iran-US Conflict
geoCTI.description: The legal dispute between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over OpenAI's mission shift masks a deeper integration of frontier AI into US kinetic operations.

geoCTI.title: Trellix Source Code Breach: Assessing the Risk of Downstream Vulnerability Injection
geoCTI.description: Trellix has confirmed that an unauthorized actor gained access to a portion of its source code repository.

geoCTI.title: US Defense Department Integration of Google, Microsoft, and OpenAI AI into Classified Systems
geoCTI.description: The US Department of Defense has formalized agreements with seven technology leaders, including Google, Microsoft, Amazon Web Services, Nvidia, OpenAI, Reflection, and SpaceX, to deploy artificial intelligence within classified operational environments.

geoCTI.title: AI-Augmented Exploitation in the Mexican Government Breach: From Data Exfiltration to Automated Forgery
geoCTI.description: A single operator leveraged Claude Code and ChatGPT to breach nine Mexican government entities between December 2025 and February 2026, compromising hundreds of millions of records.

geoCTI.title: APT37's Use of Facebook and RokRAT Reveals a Shift Toward Social Engineering-Driven Espionage
geoCTI.description: North Korean threat actor APT37 has deployed a multi-stage infection chain leveraging Facebook social engineering to deliver the RokRAT malware.

geoCTI.title: Compromised macOS Code Signing Certificate in Axios Supply Chain Attack Targets OpenAI
geoCTI.description: North Korean-linked actors successfully compromised a macOS code signing certificate via the Axios supply chain to impact OpenAI's environment.

geoCTI.title: FBI-Indonesian Police Takedown of W3LL Phishing Network Disrupts $20M Fraud Infrastructure
geoCTI.description: The FBI and Indonesian National Police successfully dismantled the W3LL phishing toolkit infrastructure, targeting a global operation responsible for $20 million in attempted fraud.

geoCTI.title: Fiber Optic Interception and PDF Zero-Days: Assessing Infrastructure Vulnerability
geoCTI.description: State-sponsored actors have successfully compromised fiber optic infrastructure to facilitate long-term signal intelligence collection.

geoCTI.title: Indonesia’s Disinformation Bill: Legal Expansion as a Tool for Domestic Political Control
geoCTI.description: The Indonesian government, led by Coordinating Minister Yusril Ihza Mahendra, is advancing a new legislative framework to regulate 'foreign propaganda' and disinformation.

geoCTI.title: OpenAI Certificate Revocation: Assessing the Scope of the Axios Supply Chain Breach
geoCTI.description: The compromise of the Axios npm package via the malicious 'plain-crypto-js' dependency allowed the North Korean group UNC1069 to execute the WAVESHAPER.V2 backdoor within OpenAI's macOS application...

geoCTI.title: Operation Atlantic: Assessing the Limits of Multi-Jurisdictional Crypto-Asset Seizures
geoCTI.description: The UK National Crime Agency, alongside US and Canadian law enforcement, successfully froze $12 million in cryptocurrency following a week-long crackdown on 'approval phishing' networks.

geoCTI.title: PlugX Deployment via Claude-Branded Phishing Targets AI-Adopting Workforces
geoCTI.description: Threat actors are weaponizing the rapid adoption of Large Language Models by deploying a trojanized Anthropic Claude installer to compromise end-user workstations.

geoCTI.title: US-Indonesia Cooperation Targets W3LL Phishing Infrastructure
geoCTI.description: The FBI Atlanta Field Office and Indonesian authorities successfully dismantled the W3LL phishing platform and arrested its developer.

geoCTI.title: Watering Hole Attack on CPUID Website Leverages DLL Sideloading for STX RAT Distribution
geoCTI.description: Threat actors compromised a secondary API on the CPUID website to redirect users to malicious installers for hardware monitoring tools like CPU-Z and HWMonitor.
